text: New publication: CRISPR screen of human pancreatic cancer xenografts identifies a KLF5 proliferation vulnerability through epigenetic modifiers NCAPD2 and MTHFD1.
New publication: DNA Methylation Stochasticity is Linked to Transcriptional Variability and Convergent Epigenetic Disruption Across Genetic Subtypes of Acute Myeloid Leukemia.
New publication: A systematic evaluation of highly variable gene selection methods for single-cell RNA-sequencing.
New publication: SARS-CoV-2 induces neutrophil degranulation and differentiation into myeloid-derived suppressor cells associated with severe COVID-19.
New publication: DNA methylation memory of pancreatic acinar-ductal metaplasia transition state altering Kras-downstream PI3K and Rho GTPase signaling in the absence of Kras mutation.
New publication: Regulatory T Cell Mimicry by a Subset of Mesenchymal GBM Stem Cells Suppresses CD4 and CD8 Cells.
New publication: Sex Differences in B Cell Dynamics after Seasonal Influenza Vaccination are Dependent on the Age and Hormonal Profile of Vaccinees.
New publication: Global Mapping of Combinatorial Chromatin Regulatory Events Using Hi-Plex CUT&Tag.
New publication: TGFBR2-High mesenchymal glioma stem cells phenocopy regulatory T cells to suppress CD4+ and CD8+ T cell function.
New publication: Sex differences in B cell dynamics after seasonal influenza vaccination are dependent on the age and hormonal status of vaccinees 3346.
New publication: Estrogen upregulates NF-κB and TNF signaling in B cells to cause sex and age differences in antibody responses to seasonal influenza vaccination.
New publication: scMBERT: A Pre-Trained Deep Learning Model for Single-Cell Multiomic Data Representation and Prediction (Student Abstract).
New publication: Differential roles of positive and negative supercoiling in organizing the E. coli genome.
New publication: Cell-free DNA reveals distinct pathology of multisystem inflammatory syndrome in children.
New publication: Methylation of the chromatin modifier KMT2D by SMYD2 contributes to therapeutic response in hormone-dependent breast cancer.
New publication: miR-217-5p NanomiRs Inhibit Glioblastoma Growth and Enhance Effects of Ionizing Radiation via EZH2 Inhibition and Epigenetic Reprogramming.
New publication: Emergency Myelopoiesis Distinguishes Multisystem Inflammatory Syndrome in Children From Pediatric Severe Coronavirus Disease 2019.
New publication: DNA methylation stochasticity is linked to transcriptional variability and identifies convergent epigenetic disruption across genetically-defined subtypes of AML.
New publication: Quantifying Functional Conservation of Human and Mouse Regulatory Elements via FUNCODE.
New publication: Alpha-Ketoglutarate is a master regulator of epigenetic reprogramming in pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma progression.
New preprint on medRxiv: Mitochondrial induced T cell apoptosis and aberrant myeloid metabolic programs define distinct immune cell subsets during acute and recovered SARS-CoV-2 infection.
Our paper Single-cell ATAC-seq signal extraction and enhancement with SCATE is published in Genome Biology.
Our paper Global prediction of chromatin accessibility using small-cell-number and single-cell RNA-seq is published in Nucleic Acids Research.
Our paper Genome-wide Prediction of DNase I Hypersensitivity Using Gene Expression is published in Nature Communications.
